Core Skills

  • Technical Skills

    Networking, System Monitoring, Linux, SQL, Python, Java, C++, Firewall Configuration, Windows Server 2025, Active Directory, Entra ID, Virtual Machines.

  • Analysis & Operations

    Technical Troubleshooting, Incident Response, Root Cause Analysis, Audit Analysis, Change Management, Process Documentation.

Education

  • Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science
    University of Wisconsin - Madison, 2022
  • CompTIA Security+ Certification
    Milwaukee, WI, 2026

Professional Summary

IT Professional with over 6 years of experience across incident response, global networking, and client-facing support. Excels in technical troubleshooting, incident analysis, event management, preventative maintenance, and documentation practices. I specialize in breaking down complex system failures into their core components through a disciplined, step-by-step investigative approach. Eager to leverage a verbose background in troubleshooting and root cause analysis to protect enterprise assets in a dedicated Cybersecurity role.

Experience

Systems Operations Engineer

Fidelity Information Services (FIS) | Brown Deer, WI | August 2022 - Present

  • Managed the end-to-end lifecycle of 200+ monthly tickets, prioritizing a deep-dive understanding of core failure patterns to ensure 100% data integrity and comprehensive audit trails for regulatory compliance.
  • Analyzed complex application logs and transaction alerts to identify and mitigate 50+ potential disruptions weekly, performing deep-dive forensic audits that reduced recurring system downtime by 50%.
  • Led cross-functional teams during high-pressure emergency incidents to reduce MTTR, maintaining 99% connectivity uptime and validating 15+ weekly production changes for global data centers.

IT Support Specialist / Web Developer

UW Madison Division of Information Technology Help Desk | Madison, WI | October 2019 - May 2022

  • Awarded "Agent of the Month" for providing top-tier, all-inclusive technical support to students and faculty; managed a high volume of requests across phone, email, and live chat with a focus on rapid problem resolution.
  • Led the large-scale transition of faculty and students to remote learning during COVID-19, developing comprehensive training materials and updating the technical knowledge base to ensure zero-day continuity.
  • Optimized internal workflows by developing and maintaining web applications using SQL and JavaScript, streamlining administrative processes and improving data accessibility for the support team.

Electronics Team Member

Target Corporation | New Berlin, WI | June 2016 - August 2018

  • Provided a friendly face of customer service, checking on people who may need assistance and anticipating their needs.
  • Gave recommendations and insight into the latest technology, tailoring to their needs as a consumer.
Selected Projects

Practice SIEM & Malware Investigation

Responded to Critical, High, and Medium level alerts in Let's Defend practice SIEM tool. Investigated malware on virtual machines to understand the attacker's process, attack vector, and kill chain.

  • View Details

Virtualized DMZ / Network Implementation

Created a multi-zone network (WAN/DMZ/LAN) using VirtualBox to isolate internal servers; deployed a pfSense virtual firewall gateway to manage traffic flow and enforce perimeter security.

  • View Details

AES Encryption Algorithm

Developed a functional AES-128 encryption pipeline in Python. Implemented the four-stage transformation rounds and the Rijndael key expansion schedule.

  • View Details
